title: plectranthus deccanicus
intro: Plectranthus deccanicus, a species of flowering plant in the mint family, is also known as Indian coleus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. Its health benefits include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in reducing stress and improving overall well-being. Plectranthus deccanicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
